signal_evidence.services_demand: January net deposits were nearly $4 billion, of which about one-third was net positive transfers in from other brokers. That January result was the highest monthly total since the first half of 2021.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We are planning to spend up to about $100 million more in marketing in 2024... we have a plan to take [core costs] down high-single-digits, perhaps even 10%, and redirecting that spend to fund new growth initiatives.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Gold subscribers are up 25% year-over-year to 1.42 million... the $5 a month it's just a screaming deal. We want it to be obvious for every customer that they should be a Gold subscriber.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We've already exceeded [the $1.3B Q4 brokerage transfer total] halfway through Q1... we've already grown more in the first half of Q1 than we did in each of the last eight quarters.
